'''SSA-306''' was a [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]] [[OOM-series security droid/Legends|OOM security battle droid]] serving the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He was one of the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] sent to escort [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] to the [[Camp Four/Legends|Camp Four]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] for processing. On the way there, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] escort was attacked by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who destroyed all of the droids, including SSA-306.

==Biography==
SSA-306 was an<ref name="CCG" /> [[OOM-series security droid/Legends|OOM security battle droid]]<ref name="TPM" /><ref name="NEGTD" /> manufactured by [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]] for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]].<ref name="Databank" /> He had already entered service<ref name="CCG" /> by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> when the Federation established a [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade]] around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] as an act of protest against the taxation of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] introduced by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. After a failed negotiation attempt with two [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassadors]]—[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]—the Federation forces landed on the planet and [[Capture of Theed/Legends|captured]] the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].<ref name="TPM" /> In the aftermath of the battle, SSA-306 was assigned to guard duty at the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]].<ref name="CCG" />

When [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] refused to sign a treaty with the Trade Federation, [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] ordered his [[Battle droid/Legends|droids]] to take her for processing. SSA-306 was one of four [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that escorted Amidala—along with Theed [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]], several other members of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]], and Amidala's [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]]—to the [[Camp Four/Legends|Camp Four]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]]. However, on the way there, the droids were attacked by Jinn and Kenobi, who had spotted the convoy while looking for a way to contact the Republic and inform the Senate about the Federation's invasion. SSA-306 was destroyed by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], along with the rest of the droid escort.<ref name="TPM" />

==Characteristics==
SSA-306 had [[Bone/Legends|bone]]-[[Color/Legends|white]] and [[red]] plating.<ref name="TPM" /><ref name="SWE" /> He used a standard [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]]<ref name="CCG" /> and, like all B1 battle droids, was 1.93 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="SWE" /> SSA-306 was known as a droid whose shift could only be ended by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
This droid first appeared, unnamed, in [[George Lucas]]'s [[1999]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="TPM" /> The droid was identified as SSA-306 in the [[2001]] ''[[Theed Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
